nodes.label: Namma Transit — unified API router for transit features.  PRD features served:
Deterministic float in [lo, hi] from a string seed.
Deterministic pick from a list using a string seed.
Generate deterministic TRSFeatures from a route_id.      Ensures the same route
Derive explainable TRS sub-scores (0-100) from the same features used by the mod
Sliding-window rate limiter. Returns True if request is allowed.
Generate multi-modal transit routes with TRS scores.
Return a plausible transfer hub name for a mode combo.
Build mock TransferLeg objects for a multi-modal route config.
Network-wide trust metrics for the Home screen Trust Dashboard.
Return live positions of transit vehicles near a location.
Get the current TRS for a specific route.      TRS is deterministic for a given
Submit a crowd-sourced transit observation.      Rate-limited to 10 requests per
Deterministic Chennai-themed crowd reports so the feed never looks empty in a de
Get recent verified crowd reports from the database.
Aggregate community-contribution metrics for the Crowd Pulse screen.
Subscribe to delay alerts for a route.
Proxy endpoint to OpenStreetMap Nominatim with caching.
IVR voice lookup — returns next vehicles for a stop.          Note: This is a pr
Compute transfer failure probability for an active journey.      Called periodic
Stream live vehicle positions over WebSocket.      Accepts optional bounding-box
